title: clusia major
intro: Clusia major, also known as the 'Autumn Croton', is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clusia major include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in its raw form, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
